name: Cheesy Rice and Beef
recipeIngredient: 2 cups ground beef, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the tomato soup, milk, and parsley; stir to blend.
2. Add the cooked and drained ground beef, chopped onions, and cooked rice to the bowl. Stir until everything is well mixed.
3. Transfer the mixture into a 10x6-inch pan.
4. Sprinkle the shredded mozzarella cheese evenly over the top of the mixture.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
